_comment: MCA registry. Each MCA entry defines which optional scope expansions are active beyond the Michigan state base protocol. Two expansion tiers: bls_expansions (Specialist-default skills granted to EMT/MFR) and specialist_expansions (Paramedic-default skills granted to Specialist/AEMT). Both drive runtime scope adaptation in scenario_engine.adapt_scenario_to_context() and are injected into AI prompts via _build_mca_expansions_block().

mcas.notes: Michigan state base protocols — no MCA-specific expansions configured. Use this for testing or agencies not yet assigned to a specific MCA.

West Michigan Regional Medical Control Coalition — Kent County. BLS expansions reflect WMRMCC board approvals through 2025. Specialist expansions pending protocol review — populate from the _expansion_registry keys below.

_expansion_registry._comment: Reference definitions for all known expansion keys. Not loaded at runtime — documentation only. Keys are referenced in bls_expansions or specialist_expansions arrays on each MCA entry.

_bls_expansions._comment: Skills that are Specialist-default in base Michigan protocol; MCA selection grants them to EMT or MFR scope.
_bls_expansions.epi_drawup_im: BLS/MFR authorized to draw up and administer epinephrine 1 mg/mL IM for anaphylaxis (from vial, not auto-injector). Requires MCA-approved training.
_bls_expansions.cpap_bls: BLS authorized to initiate and manage CPAP for respiratory distress.
_bls_expansions.i_gel_bls: BLS authorized to place I-Gel (or equivalent) supraglottic airway device (adult).
_bls_expansions.ondansetron_emt: EMT authorized to administer ondansetron 4 mg ODT for nausea/vomiting.
_bls_expansions.glucometer_mfr: MFR scope includes blood glucose testing via glucometer (EMT scope by default in Michigan; MFR requires MCA selection).
_bls_expansions.twelve_lead_emt: EMT authorized to acquire and transmit 12-lead ECG (Specialist default without this selection).
_bls_expansions.waveform_capnography_emt: EMT authorized to use waveform capnography (numeric capnometry is EMT default; waveform requires MCA selection).

_specialist_expansions._comment: Skills that are Paramedic-default in base Michigan protocol; MCA selection grants them to Specialist/AEMT scope.
_specialist_expansions.manual_defib_specialist: Specialist authorized to perform manual defibrillation for V-fib/pVT/unstable irregular wide complex (Paramedic default without this selection).
_specialist_expansions.push_dose_epi_specialist: Specialist authorized to administer push-dose epinephrine IV/IO for hemodynamic instability (Paramedic default without this selection).
_specialist_expansions.txa_specialist: Specialist authorized to administer tranexamic acid (TXA) for hemorrhagic shock (Paramedic default without this selection).
_specialist_expansions.rsi_specialist: Specialist authorized to perform RSI and advanced airway management including pharmacological assistance (Paramedic default without this selection).
_specialist_expansions.ketorolac_specialist: Specialist authorized to administer ketorolac IM/IV for pain management (requires MCA selection; Specialist and above once selected).
_specialist_expansions.twelve_lead_specialist: Specialist (and below per additional MCA selection) authorized to acquire and transmit 12-lead ECG when not already granted via twelve_lead_emt.
